sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115568" key="yeudostigmati/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδοστιγμᾰτίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115568.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a false</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pretended</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στιγματίας,</foreign> name of a play by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicostr.Com.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
